prompt: The Gemini prompts we're using to generate game metadata are returning inconsistent results. Sometimes the rules summary is great, sometimes it's missing key information or includes irrelevant details. The generated JSON structure is valid but the content quality varies wildly. How do I improve the prompt and validate the output?
expected_output: Gemini prompt engineering techniques, how to test and iterate on prompts, validation rules for metadata quality, examples of good vs bad outputs, systematic approach to prompt optimization

assertions.name: Prompt engineering techniques
assertions.description: Explains specific prompt engineering techniques (temperature, examples, constraints) for improving Gemini output

assertions.name: Testing and iteration methodology
assertions.description: Provides a systematic approach to testing and iterating on prompts

assertions.name: Validation rules provided
assertions.description: Includes specific validation rules or criteria for evaluating metadata quality

assertions.name: Examples of good vs bad output
assertions.description: Demonstrates examples of good vs bad outputs to show the difference

assertions.name: Systematic optimization approach
assertions.description: Provides a step-by-step approach to systematically improve prompt quality

assertions.name: Practical implementation guidance
assertions.description: Includes code or configuration examples for implementing the improvements
